description: Educational accessibility platform: real-time audio transcription + screenshot explanation broadcast via WebSocket

domain/ports.role: Abstract interfaces (protocols) for each external dependency

files.name: deduplication.py
files.role: Perceptual hash (dHash) + in-memory LRU cache to avoid re-sending identical screenshots to the AI

stt.note: Uses httpx.AsyncClient to POST multipart to Groq API. Filename MUST include .wav extension (Groq inspects extension, not content-type)

vision.note: Groq requires image dimensions >= 2x2 pixels. 1x1 PNG returns 400

gcp_placeholder.status: PLACEHOLDER — ready to implement Google Cloud STT + Vision API

in_memory.limitation: Data lost on server restart. Swap to a DB-backed repository for production

in_memory.note: Delegates to ConnectionManager.broadcast(). Swap to Redis pub/sub for horizontal scaling

websocket.connection_manager: Per-room dict of WebSocket connections with dead-connection cleanup on send failure

dependencies.role: FastAPI dependency that fetches the global Container singleton

container.role: Wires all dependencies: Settings → Providers → UseCases → single DI entrypoint

schemas.api.py: JoinRequest, StateResponse (with field aliases: userId, classroomId, etc.)

test.coverage: 12 tests — health, join, state, audio STT, screenshot vision, dedup, WebSocket receipt
test.status: 12/12 PASSING (verified with real Groq API key)

known_issues.audio_filename_extension: FIXED — filename changed from 'audio' to 'audio.wav' in stt.py:20. Groq inspects extension, not content-type
known_issues.vision_model_id: FIXED — model changed from 'qwen-3.6-27b' → 'qwen/qwen3.6-27b' → 'meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct' in config.py:15 and .env
known_issues.png_min_dimensions: FIXED — Groq requires >= 2x2 pixels. make_minimal_png() now generates 4x4
known_issues.in_memory_data_loss: UNFIXED — restarting the server clears all classrooms. Expected for MVP
known_issues.no_auth: UNFIXED — no authentication/authorization. All endpoints are public

next_steps: Replace in-memory repository with PostgreSQL/SQLite (maybe SQLAlchemy + Alembic)
Replace in-memory realtime publisher with Redis pub/sub for multi-process scaling
Add health check dependencies (DB ping, provider health)
Add rate limiting and request validation

frontend.tech_stack: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS 4, react-router-dom v7

key_structure.api_client: lib/api/ — fetch wrapper targeting VITE_API_URL (default http://localhost:8000)
key_structure.websocket: lib/ws/classroomSocket.ts — singleton ClassroomSocket, connects to VITE_WS_URL/classrooms/{id}/events
key_structure.routing: BrowserRouter with 4 routes, wrapped in AppProviders (ToastProvider + ClassroomProvider)

integration_points: apiRequest<T>() in lib/api/ — connect to backend REST endpoints
classroomSocket in lib/ws/ — connect to backend WebSocket at ws://localhost:8000/ws/classrooms/{id}
Backend events (transcript.final, screenshot.processed) are consumed in ClassroomProvider
frontend.status: Functional with demo data. Requires backend running for full integration. 4 pages implemented (teacher, deaf student, blind student, home).

team_handoff.backend_dev: Run 'uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000', ensure GROQ_API_KEY is in .env, test with 'python test_e2e.py --with-ai'
team_handoff.frontend_dev: Run 'pnpm dev', ensure VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 in .env, connect to backend for live data
team_handoff.full_integration_test: Start backend → Start frontend → Open /teacher → Join classroom → Upload audio/screenshots → Verify WebSocket events appear on student pages
team_handoff.git_workflow: Branch feature/backend-ai-accessibility has all backend changes. Frontend is on feature/board-camera-support. Merge when both are stable.
